text:
with CMS. 

If the beneficiary was enrolled in more than one plan during the year, this is the contract number for 
the Part D plan in which the beneficiary was enrolled at the end of the year. 

The first character of the plan contract ID is a letter representing the type of plan. 

SHORT NAME: PLNCNTRC 

LONG NAME: PLAN_CNTRCT_REC_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 5-digit alpha/numeric value. First digit is one of the following: 
H = Managed Care Organizations other than
